description: For a couple of years now it's regularly updated and enhanced with more possibilities.
author: Alfred B.
pros: It's so easy to program multi-platform-applications.
cons: Documentation not available in many different languages.

description: I was able to create many app with this product and can say its been a amazing experience!
author: Jayden C.
pros: Easy to use and understand! I highly recommend this to thers
cons: Nothing that I could think of that I like least of it. So far has been a great experince!

review_title: VisualNeo Web - A well founded Web App Builder
description: I have worked with VisualNeo Web on and off for about 4 years. Over that time it has matured and become very versatile. As a user of the previous Neobook application it was easy to migrate to this web app builder.
author: Matthew I.
pros: Similar to Neobook and VisualNeo Win, this web edition makes it easy to construct web apps. Pre defined statements and a versatile ide make programming fun.
cons: Learning curve is a little steep when trying to create standalone applications.

description: I have been using thee NEOscript language for years and it is one of the best.
author: Fotis K.
pros: The NEOscript language is easy to understand. And the plugins offer the best selection of tools I've seen, with HTML, CSS, and Javascript in one user interface.
cons: It needs some more HTML formatting presets for old fashioned web pages.

description: At first sight it looks complex but nothing far from reality. Once you start with the beginners tutorials easily understand the whole interface and functionalities.
author: Yolanda C.
pros: As a non programmer it has been easy to start and understand the software. Now I'm able to create my own apps!
cons: I can't think on any cons. It's even available in spanish.

description: I have had an amazing experience creating unique and fun web sites that look like no other and the limitless ways I can design the look and feel of my sites.
author: Neal S.
pros: The ease of use and the creative ways I can do my websites.
cons: No complaints. Feeling empty space because I can't submit if I don't.

description: I am customer from the first day. Excellent product!!
author: SAKIS M.
pros: To make a application for mobile phones

review_title: Fast and powerful to create stunning applications.
description: I think VisualNEO Web enables a quick route to creating stunning looking web applications, paired with some of the plugins allow powerful functions. The conversion and wrapping to native applications is also useful.
author: Adrian B.
pros: Ease of use, great support with some amazing updates from the company. The user base and forum is also a great source of information and support and is very active which helps a lot.
cons: Initially plugin installation and support for 3rd party JS packages. Would be good to somehow easily add these into projects from open source repos.

author: Emmanuel N.
pros: It s thé best software to create application web
cons: The french version IS not perfect For me...

review_title: my review about visual neo web
description: i tried its trial program due to my financial status... i bought visual neo book which is somehow limited to pc app ... i regreted not to buy visual neo web
author: jaynos A.
pros: its built in features that could easily help non coders create beautiful apps and websites
cons: none ... due to its flexibility and potential to create anything i want to imagine ...
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: VIVIR LA AVENTURA Y EL VIAJE DE PROGRAMAR SIN SABER!
description: El punto mas fuerte es el producto sin duda, en constante avance y mejora, apoyado por una comunidad de foro atenta y pronta a prestar ayuda.
author: ALEJANDRO ALBERTO V.
pros: Su entorno similar a neobok win. facil e intuitivo
cons: en algunos casos puntuales la falta de ejemplos, escenciales para usuarios con poca o sin nada de experiencia

description: At the beginning was really confusing, but with the tutorials it comes easily
author: Thibeault M.
pros: Fácil de utilizar y de comprender aprecio mucho los tutoriales
cons: Me gustaría contar con más tutoriales para tener más conocimientos
